g.text: E4 One day in the life — Tuesday, 24 hours

path.style: fill: none; stroke: #000000; stroke-width: 0.8; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-linecap: square

text.style: fill: #9a9a9a; font: italic 8.5px 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start

g.text: Real data, one representative day. The light idles through the night, follows the morning commute, drifts with midday flow, and rises to its busiest 'aware' and 'engaged' states across the afternoon rush — its behaviour breathing with the rhythm of the street.
